TryGetValueAsArray(int, out IJSONArray)

Returns array value at a given index as IJSONArray. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsArray(int Index, out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value IJSONArray

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsBoolean(int, out bool)

Returns array value at a given index as boolean. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsBoolean(int Index, out bool Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value bool

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDate(int, out DateTime)

Returns array value at a given index as DATE. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsDate(int Index, out DateTime Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value DateTime

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDouble(int, out double)

Returns array value at a given index as double. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsDouble(int Index, out double Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value double

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsInt64(int, out long)

Returns array value at a given index as LONGLONG. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsInt64(int Index, out long Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value long

Returns

bool

Index int

TryGetValueAsString(int, out string)

Returns array value at a given index as string. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsString(int Index, out string Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value string

Returns

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsUInt64(int, out ulong)

Returns array value at a given index as ULONGLONG. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsUInt64(int Index, out ulong Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value ulong

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsVariant(int, int, out object)

Returns array value at a given index as a VARIANT of the requested type. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsVariant(int Index, int variantType, out object Value)

Parameters

Index int
variantType int
Value object

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Value[int]

Returns an array value at a given index. Returns E_INVALIDARG if index is out of bounds.

virtual object Value[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Returns

object

Examples
